scripts.dev: bunx concurrently -n console,api,probe,scheduler "bun run dev:console" "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:probe" "bun run dev:scheduler"
scripts.check:boundaries: bun run tooling/scripts/check-boundaries.ts && bun run tooling/scripts/check-retired-paths.ts
scripts.check: bun run check:boundaries && bun run types:cf:check && bun run --cwd apps/console check && bun run --cwd apps/api check && bun run --cwd apps/scheduler check && bun run --cwd apps/browser-audit-worker check && bunx tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/domain-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/report-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/config/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json --noEmit
